languages.text: {n}Рассеченное горло кадавра издает несколько хлюпающих хрипов, складывающихся в знакомые вам слова.{/n} "Ош-ш-ибка. За-прашш-иваемый иденти-фи-кха-тор не рас... х-х-х... позна..."
{n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."
languages.original_text: {n}Рассеченное горло кадавра издает несколько хлюпающих хрипов, складывающихся в знакомые вам слова.{/n} "Ош-ш-ибка. За-прашш-иваемый иденти-фи-кха-тор не рас... х-х-х... позна..."

traits.locale_text: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."
{n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."
{n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."

languages.text: {n}死体の喉の切り口から、幾度か絞り出すような喘ぎ声が漏れ、認識できる単語を形成する:{/n}「エッ...ッ...ッ。リ...ク...エスト...ド...デ...シ...グ...ネ...イ...ション...ノ...ッ...ッ...」
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."

traits.locale_text: {n}死体の喉の切り口から、幾度か絞り出すような喘ぎ声が漏れ、認識できる単語を形成する:{/n}「エッ...ッ...ッ。リ...ク...エスト...ド...デ...シ...グ...ネ...イ...ション...ノ...ッ...ッ...」。

languages.text: {n}La garganta rebanada suelta unos jadeos húmedos antes de pronunciar algo inteligible:{/n} «Err-rrr-orr. De-sssigna-ción ssso-lici-tada no... dis... ponible...».
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."

traits.locale_text: {n}La garganta rebanada suelta unos jadeos húmedos antes de pronunciar algo inteligible:{/n} «Err-rrr-orr. De-sssigna-ción ssso-lici-tada no... dis... ponible...».

languages.text: {n}Die aufgeschlitzte Kehle des Kadavers formt keuchend einige erkennbare Worte:{/n} "Feh-ler. An-ge-for-der-te Ken-nung nicht ... er-kannt ..."
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."

traits.locale_text: {n}Die aufgeschlitzte Kehle des Kadavers formt keuchend einige erkennbare Worte:{/n} "Feh-ler. An-ge-for-der-te Ken-nung nicht ... er-kannt ..."

languages.text: {n}La gorge tranchée du cadavre laisse échapper des sifflements répugnants, qui se mêlent pour former quelques mots.{/n} « Err-rrr-eur... Re-quê-te non rrr...re...connue... »
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."

traits.locale_text: {n}La gorge tranchée du cadavre laisse échapper des sifflements répugnants, qui se mêlent pour former quelques mots.{/n} « Err-rrr-eur... Re-quê-te non rrr...re...connue... »

languages.text: {n}尸体被割开的喉咙发出几声胶着的喘息，断续地拼凑成可辨识的词句：{/n}“错-误-。请-求-指-定-编-号……无……法-识-别……”
languages.original_text: {n}The cadaver's slit throat lets out a few squelching wheezes, coming together to form recognisable words:{/n} "Err-rrr-orr. Re-quessss-ted dessss-igna-ttion no... rrr... cognised..."

traits.locale_text: {n}尸体被割开的喉咙发出几声胶着的喘息，断续地拼凑成可辨识的词句：{/n}“错-误-。请-求-指-定-编-号……无……法-识-别……”

languages.text: {n}Kadavranın yarık boğazından vıcık vıcık birkaç hırıltı çıkıyor ve bunlar, birleşerek tanınabilir kelimeler oluşturuyor.{/n} "Ha... Taaaa. Taa... Leepp edi... Lennn taa... Nımmm ta... Nnn... Nınmadı..."
